title: PLDM Firmware Update Conditions
description: Schema for pre/post setup targets used by platform firmware update conditions.

Component.description: Component name for readability (optional, for documentation purposes).

ComIdentifier.description: Component identifier (uint16_t) used to map update conditions.

PreUpdateTarget.description: Systemd target/service to run before update. Empty string means no pre-condition.

PostUpdateTarget.description: Systemd target/service to run after update. Empty string means no post-condition.

ArgTemplate.description: Array of argument fields to pass to systemd interface. Supported candidates: boardName, applyTime. Empty array or omitted means no arguments.
